name: user_id
description: Which person this HRV reading belongs to

name: sleep_date
description: Calendar date of the sleep night (matches garmin_daily.date); groups a night's readings

name: ts
description: Reading timestamp (UTC). Garmin samples overnight HRV about every 5 minutes during sleep

name: hrv_value
description: HRV (RMSSD) for this ~5-min window, in milliseconds
